| | Friend

This morning I held a press conference on the deteriorating situation at Western State Hospital and Jay Inslee's ongoing cover up of the serious problems there.

You aren't seeing things - that is actually 25,000 keys on the table in front of me. Why? Because a Department of Corrections report (a report Governor Inslee kept secret until the media uncovered it) revealed that 25,000 master keys at Western State Hospital were missing.

It seems ridiculous because it is. How exactly do 25,000 master keys just vanish?

Governor Inslee's incompetence jeopardizes the safety of our neighborhoods. We need a governor who will fix our state's mental health system and secure Western State Hospital.

[Can you contribute $35, $75, or even $250](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=0d838d21d9&e=32f1a3df98) to make sure that every voter in Washington hears about Jay Inslee's failure and cover up at Western State?

**Bill Bryant**

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: Blatant homophobia >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0e90/24c69fd9/19a8de78/18e8c06e/3761804451/VEsH/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFCU43N_digital_email_20160921_Craig_n-all&source=WPEFCU43N_digital_email_20160921_Craig_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Angie Craig would be the first openly gay person to represent Minnesota in Congress -- and Republicans are attacking her for it.

Last week a local Republican leader put out a fundraiser invitation for Angie's opponent with a photo of Angie, her wife, and their four children alongside family photos of four Republicans who are running for office. The caption below the photo said, "She's a liberal and this is her family. She and her female marriage partner and their 4 teenage sons," as if Angie's family was a problem.

That kind of blatant homophobia deserves a response.

And it's all the more reason we need to make sure Angie wins.

**[Have Angie's back by making a $3 donation to her today. 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0e90/24c69fd9/19a8de78/18e8fd4d/3761804451/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/angie-craig?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Have+Angies+back+by+making+a+3+donation+&utm_campaign=WPEFCU43N_digital_email_20160921_Craig_n-all&source=WPEFCU43N_digital_email_20160921_Craig_n-all")**

You may think that this kind of attack is limited to just one abhorrent comment from a far-right Minnesota Republican. But Angie's opponent, former right-wing radio show host Jason Lewis, is no stranger to this kind of thinking.

He doesn't see LGBT discrimination as a real problem, saying, "Gay couples are no more discriminated against than the polygamist, the drug user, or the loan shark."

He's said allowing transgender students to use the school restroom of their choice is "an abomination."

And he certainly doesn't think highly of women. In 2012 he said, "You've got a vast majority of young single women who couldn't explain to you what GDP means. You know what they care about? They care about abortion. They care about abortion and gay marriage. They care about 'The View.' They are non-thinking."

It's no wonder that he's earned the nickname "Minnesota's mini-Trump."

We can't let Republicans get away with homophobic attacks on Angie, and we DEFINITELY can't let candidates like Jason Lewis get a national spotlight in the House.

**Right now their race is neck-and-neck. Donate $3 to have Angie's back -- 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Angie-Now](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0e90/24c69fd9/19a8de78/18e8c068/3761804451/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/angie-craig?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpAngieNow&utm_campaign=WPEFCU43N_digital_email_20160921_Craig_n-all&source=WPEFCU43N_digital_email_20160921_Craig_n-all")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

name: Ben Carson
subject: A request for the 20112 area:
body:
Peter,

In the roughly 4 months since I accepted the role of Honorary
National Chairman of My Faith Votes, we've made tremendous
progress in our mission to motivate Christians to vote in 2016.

The concentration has been on reaching people where they are --
their email inboxes, on Facebook, on radio, on TV and so on --
because that's what real change requires. It requires building
support from the bottom up; block by block, community by
community.

So today, we're looking to build our support base in the 20112
area. Specifically, we're looking for 10 people in the area to
donate $25 or more. Will you help with a secure, tax-deductible
donation now?

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=83

If you're wondering what your donation will help to achieve, here
are some numbers for you. Because of the incredibly generous
support of tens of thousands of people around the country, My
Faith Votes has now:

- Launched an online Personal Voting Assistant tool called
TurboVote to help Christians register to vote and apply for
absentee voting.

- Developed and aired 23 TV PSAs reaching 110 million households,
with is 95% of the 116 million households in America.

- Developed and aired 12 radio PSAs that are now being played by
205 stations in 29 states. Of the 205 stations, 101 are in target
swing states.

- Held a weekly live webcast including the 9/11 event called
"Give Thanks" with World Outreach Church and notable Christian
leaders such as Michael W. Smith and Mike Huckabee, reaching over
590,000 people.

Every single day, we are making tangible progress and I'd like to
personally ask that you help us to keep our foot on the gas.
November 8 is just around the corner, and we must ensure that
every single neighborhood in America is participating in some
way.

Will you help out in the 20112 area by making a secure,
tax-deductible donation of $25 or more right now?

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=83

As you can see above, these resources are being put to good use
to accomplish the mission. With your help, I know we will be
successful, and America will be better off for it.

Thank you for your ongoing generosity and commitment.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Eileen Sheehy, 2013 Teacher of the Year
subject: I've seen firsthand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend, Steve calls Montana's public school system one of our "great equalizers." **As a teacher for more than 30 years,** I have a firsthand view of how correct he is. That's why it's so important we keep an advocate for public schools in the governor's office.

**[If you agree, please join me in donating $50 to re-elect Steve.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=BGQwRmZG4k8h0kgJ2zstbBGImZqr5Lcf)**

Steve attended our public schools growing up. He sends his three kids to public schools -- his youngest is in elementary school and his oldest goes to the same high school both Steve and his wife Lisa attended.

As governor, he's made record investments in our public schools, expanded pre-K access throughout the state, frozen tuition at our universities and increased job training programs.

Talk to Governor Bullock for five minutes and you will know how much it matters to him that every Montana child has access to the same opportunities he had growing up.

I know that Montana's public education system is in good hands under Steve's leadership and that's why I will be doing everything I can to make sure he gets another four years in office. **[I hope you'll help by contributing $50.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8eAVlEzv4eM3TU3ppo0mjRGImZqr5Lcf)**

Thanks,

Eileen Sheehy
2013 Montana Teacher of the Year

name: Donna Edwards
subject: My friend Gwen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Dear Friend,
When I decided to run for the Senate, I knew it would be an uphill battle. I was told it would be too hard, too expensive and I wouldn't have the support I needed. Although we didn't reach our goal, I learned a valuable lesson in friendship...Gwen Moore stands beside you.
I first met Gwen a few years back -- House Democrats had the majority and Gwen was an experienced and seasoned legislator. I learned from her, and we quickly became friends.
Gwen Moore stood beside me during my run for the U.S. Senate. And now I'm asking you to stand beside her.
[**Will you chip in $5 to help with her campaign? She's fighting hard in Wisconsin and she needs our help now more than ever.**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff46/767134fb/5c3e789f/43381756/302561671/VEsH/ "https://act.myngp.com/Forms/2328907034006718464")
Gwen's working hard in Milwaukee to turn Wisconsin blue -- and she's got a fight on her hands. The Wisconsin GOP has pushed through restrictive voter ID laws and have chipped away at the basic rights of hard-working Wisconsinites year after year.
It's time to put a stop to this in the way that only Gwen can.
[**Can you help her with a $5 contribution to her campaign?**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff46/767134fb/5c3e789f/43381756/302561671/VEsE/ "https://act.myngp.com/Forms/2328907034006718464")
Both you and Gwen were there for me when I needed you the most and now, I'm asking you to support her efforts.

Donna

name: Russ Feingold
subject: David vs. Goliath (Wells Fargo)
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
The rich and powerful gamed the system, and thought they could get away with it. Except, for once, they got caught. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4548/1c469400/9e911c/357a5fb/3527045432/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/wells-fargo?utm_source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd&source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd&utm_campaign=Wells-Fargo&utm_medium=ema") Friend, This week, Senator Elizabeth Warren went toe-to-toe with the CEO of Wells Fargo in a committee hearing, shining a light on everything that's wrong with how Wall Street operates. She clearly struck a nerve -- because the video's been watched and shared millions of times. **During the hearing, Senator Warren called on the CEO of Wells Fargo to resign -- and I'm with her 100 percent.** **[I'm joining Senator Warren in calling on the CEO of Wells Fargo to resign. It's time for some accountability. If you're with us, add your name right now.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4548/1c469400/9e911c/357a5fb/3527045432/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/wells-fargo?utm_source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd&source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd&utm_campaign=Wells-Fargo&utm_medium=ema")** It's David vs. Goliath. The rich and powerful gamed the system, and thought they'd get away with it. _Except, for once, they got caught._ For years, executives at Wells Fargo put their employees in a terrible position, pushing for unrealistic profits and creating a culture where anything goes -- just as long as the bank made money. **In this culture of corruption, the executives at the top got richer while customers got fleeced. Then, when they got caught, they pointed fingers at their employees to avoid any kind of responsibility.** The big banks and the billionaires who run them think the law doesn't apply to them. It's beyond wrong: It's disturbing. And it's time for accountability. **[Enough is enough -- It's time to start setting this right. The first step is for the CEO of Wells Fargo to accept responsibility and resign. Add your voice next to mine and Senator Warren's if you agree.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4548/1c469400/9e911c/357a5fb/3527045432/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/wells-fargo?utm_source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd&source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd&utm_campaign=Wells-Fargo&utm_medium=ema")** Wall Street already has plenty of lackeys fighting for their interests in Congress. I'm running for the Senate because middle-class and working families need someone who'll fight for _them._ It's up to progressives like us to hold their feet to the fire. Thanks for standing with me. Sincerely, Russ Feingold | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4548/1c469400/9e911c/357a5fb/3527045432/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/wells-fargo?utm_source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd&source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd&utm_campaign=Wells-Fargo&utm_medium=ema")

| **For Immediate Release**
September 22, 2016

**Media Contact** : Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776 **AT VERMONT COMMISSION ON WOMEN DEBATE, PHIL SCOTT DETAILS PLANS & PRIORITIES**
**_Highlights influence of independent women in his life & support for equal pay, women’s rights, affordable childcare & STEM programs _**
Middlesex, Vt. – At a gubernatorial forum focused on women’s issues on Thursday, Phil Scott, candidate for Governor, highlighted his commitment to women’s rights and working alongside the Vermont Commission on Women, and others, to help address the challenges women face in Vermont, and beyond.

Scott made it clear in the debate that, despite how his opponent’s surrogates have tried to paint him, he is pro-choice and supports both marriage equality and equal pay for equal work. Scott touted his record of supporting legislation to require equal pay for equal work regardless of gender, among other initiatives.

“Some of the most influential people in my life have been independent women,” he said, citing his mother – who became a single mom raising three sons, following the death of his father from wounds sustained in World War II – his Aunt Mary, and his two daughters. “It’s impossible to be a dad to daughters today and not see that there is still work to do. And I look forward to working with all of you to make sure every woman has equal opportunities,” added Scott.

Scott also doubled down on his commitment to enhancing early education opportunities and identifying new ways to make childcare more affordable, directly confronting dishonest attack ads released by his opponent’s proxies.

Highlighting the findings of the Picus Report – an independent study of Vermont’s educational spending – that identified more than $150 million of efficiency savings to be found in the current education system, Scott offered an impactful way to reinvest that money.

“Imagine if we dedicated $25 million to early education, another $25 million to science, technology, engineering and mathematics (STEM) training and took the other $100 million and returned it to taxpayers. I think this would be an enormous step in the right direction in both strengthening education and reducing property taxes,” said Scott.

Scott also laid out a vision for making childcare more affordable, highlighting the significance of the service in enabling parents to have jobs and raise families. One idea Scott proposed would be to work with communities to identify unused spaces that could be utilized by childcare providers in the community. This would significantly lower operational expenses, which would allow providers to offer lower rates and expanded capacity.

Finally, Scott drew attention to his comprehensive blueprint for economic growth, noting that focusing on the economy and affordability will help all Vermonters, and will help create more opportunities for women and address some of the core challenges they and their families face.
Read about Phil Scott’s plans at _www.philscott.org_ ###

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: ACTION NEEDED: they're risking lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
Friend, in the end politics is meant to be about action -- about working together to find solutions that advance the public good. If one side doesn't believe that government has a positive role to play, then the whole system breaks down.

That's what we have seen since the Tea Party Republican crowd took control of the Congress. Instead of doing the people's work they've been playing political games - but this time they're putting American lives at risk.

By holding up much needed funds for our response to the Zika virus, by refusing to permit a vote on common sense gun measures, and by resisting the kinds of solutions that would help us prevent drug companies from jacking up the price of lifesaving devices like the EpiPen, Republicans are making Americans less secure.

Washington Republican leaders have proven over and over that they'd rather score political points with their Tea Party supporters than deal with critical issues that impact the lives of American families. We have a chance to change this in the upcoming election. But for now, in the final weeks of this Congress, we must prevent Republicans from using the threat of a government shutdown to get their way on unrelated ideological issues. Ted Cruz tried that once. Let's make sure they don't try it again.

[**Add your name now and join me in demanding that Washington Republicans stop playing political games and start doing their jobs.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ac6/70cdc2ba/471d0c95/3975ed0/385201227/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-republicans-do-their-jobs-2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+now+and+join+me+in+demandi&utm_campaign=em092216&source=em092216")

Thank you for acting,

Chris

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W

---
Friend,

A million dollars from the Koch brothers. Two or three million from Karl Rove's group. A million and a half from the Chamber of Commerce.

That's just a portion of the ad spending against me in this campaign. But you know what it tells me? **If all those groups are ganging up to beat me, then I must be doing something right.**

[**Will you help me show these Washington big spenders that the Indiana grassroots isn 't scared of their millions? Pitch in $5 now.**](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504c6/7be36b49/1e90ee6b/78f87b6c/3362331881/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20160922.2nd&amount=10")

Maybe these guys don't like that I voted to hold big banks accountable after the 2008 financial crisis. Or that I'm opposed to any new trade agreements until we start enforcing the ones already on the books. Or that I've refused to bow to special interests and put Social Security and Medicare in jeopardy.

Whatever it is, I'm not worried about all those ads -- because **I have you on my side.** The Indiana grassroots have been with me every step of the way, and I know you won't let me down now that I'm being barraged with attack ads.

**[Will you pitch in $5 today to help me fight back against the attacks and win the votes of Hoosiers across the state?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504c6/7be36b49/1e90ee6b/78f87b6c/3362331881/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20160922.2nd&amount=10")**

Thank you,

body:
Peter,

You are invited to attend a rally with American Hero and SEAL Team 6 Operator Rob O'Neill in Springfield!

[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=5f5532b0c4&e=84041254e6)
Rob served as the tip of the spear on perhaps the most important mission in the Global War on Terror, bringing everlasting justice to the mastermind of the ‪9/11 attacks against the United States. Now, he's joining our mission in Missouri to elect Eric Greitens as governor.

Show your support for Eric Greitens and hear from American Hero Rob O'Neill. Space is limited so [RSVP today!](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=7c758751af&e=84041254e6)

-Team Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=42fe75379a&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=d3d8947272&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=1e29591a66), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=28e07e4d7b&e=84041254e6) with us!

| Everyone -- this is our chance. We're closing in **fast** on Marco Rubio. [**But we have only have 46 days left until this election is over. Please contribute now.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dca/738133e4/318aa6ae/7f8557e9/840359690/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160922pm2?refcode=pme160922pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

**Here 's the latest update:**
* In August, Rubio was up by 5 points in a Monmouth poll. Now, he's only up by a "statistically insignificant 2 points."
* Our newest ad is up on the air across Florida. It calls out Marco Rubio on his appalling record on women's health care -- he opposes a woman's right to choose even in cases of rape, incest, or Zika.
* _But here 's the bad news: _We got outspent nearly 3:1 this week by Rubio's right-wing backers.

We can't build on our momentum if they continue to drown us in right-wing cash. For us to take the lead, we need your help to get our message out to as many Floridians as possible.**[If you're ready to defeat Marco Rubio and retake the Senate, please chip in >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dca/738133e4/318aa6ae/7f8557e9/840359690/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160922pm2?refcode=pme160922pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Patrick Murphy
